questions: text to speech kivabe kaam kore?
best text to speech tools ki?
TTS er use case ki ki?
answers: Text to Speech (TTS) converts written text into spoken audio using AI. Modern TTS systems sound very natural and can mimic different voices, accents, and emotions.
TTS holo ekta technology ja text ke voice e convert kore. Google TTS, Amazon Polly, ElevenLabs — shob popular TTS tools. Accessibility, audiobooks, ar virtual assistants e use hoy.
Modern TTS uses deep learning models to generate human-like speech from text. Systems like ElevenLabs and Bark can clone voices and add emotional expression to speech.

Text to speech technology is essential for accessibility, helping visually impaired users access content. It's also used in navigation apps, virtual assistants, audiobook creation, and content creation.
